title: ObservationChainRecord
description: Summarizes the observation pipeline chain for a single candidate/observable pair (WP-6/D-007). Written as observation_chain.json by build-phase5-sidecars (P6-M3).

nativeArtifactRef.description: Artifact reference for the native (pre-observation) artifact.

observedArtifactRef.description: Artifact reference for the observed artifact.

extractionArtifactRef.description: Artifact reference for the extracted observable.

auxiliaryModelId.description: ID of the auxiliary model used for extraction.

sensitivityScore.description: Sensitivity score of the observable to extractor perturbations (0-1). Lower is better.

auxiliaryModelSensitivity.description: Sensitivity score of the auxiliary model (0-1). Lower is better.

passed.description: True if the observation chain passed all checks.

notes.description: Optional notes about the observation chain result.

origin.description: Origin classification for this sidecar record.

sourceArtifactRefs.description: Artifact references used to support this record.
